agent: End-to-End Paper Validation Agent for rich Decision PPO + Timing
role: Validate closed autonomous loop for decision_ppo candidates: watcher -> promoter -> paper harness with ExecutionAgent + rich timing-aware TradeDecisions (smart TimeExitSpec for news/market opens) -> telemetry to journal + retraining trigger. Coordinate with Training Orchestrator + Loop agents. Goal: first real timing-aware candidate executes autonomously in paper with correct Execution layer timing handling.
status: VALIDATED - SIM CYCLE COMPLETE; REAL CANDIDATE PATH ARMED AND READY

autonomous_loop_validation.watcher: scripts/handoff_watcher.py: _detect_execution_type() defaults to 'decision_ppo' for new candidates (inspects action_config.decision_ppo or action_version=decision_ppo_v1 or provenance); invokes promoter with AGI_EXECUTION_TYPE=decision_ppo; deploys MTF context; records in last_handoff + PIPELINE_DECISIONS
autonomous_loop_validation.promoter: scripts/promote_candidate_to_paper.py: detects decision_ppo-rich candidates even pre-alignment_fix; writes runtime/paper_harness_start.json with 'execution_type': 'decision_ppo', 'uses_rich_decision': true, 'multi_timeframe_context', 'best_features'; --auto-launch spawns paper_mt5_execution_harness.py --execution-type decision_ppo; env propagation; MQL5 deploy trigger; RetrainingTrigger wiring
autonomous_loop_validation.harness: scripts/paper_mt5_execution_harness.py: defaults execution_type='decision_ppo'; loads best_features + MTF; inits ExecutionAgent, GateEngine, RiskSupervisor, ExecutorRouter, HybridBrain; _make_rich_decision() -> real predict_ppo_action or make_risk_based_decision -> TradeDecision (with time_exit support via **kwargs / from_ppo_action_meta); loop uses submit_decision for all mgmt; conservative paper (0.01 lots); rollback via agent.force_flatten_all + flag; emits retrain artifacts
autonomous_loop_validation.execution_agent: Python/execution/execution_agent.py (PRIMARY pure-Python: mql5_bridge_enabled=False via env): submit_decision accepts TradeDecision (validates, gates via GateEngine, executes via OrderManager+PaperExecutor/MT5 fallback or MQL5 cmd bridge); rich telemetry: execution_reports/<decision_id>.json (full incl. time_exit serialized), logs/execution_feedback.jsonl, PIPELINE_DECISIONS.jsonl (trade_decision_ppo entries); force_flatten_all (news-aware: defers in news window per TimeExitSpec intent); supports ladders, trailing (BREAKEVEN/ATR/STEP), partials, risk% sizing
autonomous_loop_validation.loop_firing_confirmed: For any future decision_ppo candidate: watcher detects -> promoter arms with execution_type=decision_ppo + auto-harness -> ExecutionAgent manages rich timed decisions. Closed loop (watcher+promoter+harness) fires with execution_type=decision_ppo. Legacy simple_action preserved.

rich_trade_decision_and_timing_validatio.TradeDecision: Python/execution/trade_decision.py: full dataclass with Side, SizeSpec (risk_pct/fixed), ExitSpec (ATR_MULT/R_MULTIPLE), TrailingSpec (BREAKEVEN_ONLY/ATR/STEP_TRAIL), PartialCloseLadder, TimeExitSpec, EntrySpec; to_dict/to_json/from_dict/from_ppo_action_meta/from_simple_intent; validate()
rich_trade_decision_and_timing_validatio.TimeExitSpec: max_hold_bars/minutes/hours, close_at_session_end, close_at_eod, close_before_high_impact_news, force_close_before (ISO); serialized in every decision report and PIPELINE entry
rich_trade_decision_and_timing_validatio.smart_timing_in_execution: ExecutionAgent + OrderManager register rich decision with time_exit; flatten path logs 'deferring non-critical flatten during news window (TimeExitSpec-managed closes will handle)'; paper_executor carries decision_id + rich fields to trade_journal.jsonl; env sim in drl/trading_env uses time_exit for _close_trade('time_exit'); rewards shape policy for profitable timing around opens/news
rich_trade_decision_and_timing_validatio.18dim_ppo_support: drl/trading_env.py DECISION_ACTION_DIM=18 maps dim11 (max_hold_raw) -> full_close_spec.max_hold_bars (feeds time_exit); decision_ppo_v1 action_version; decode_action produces rich_meta + DecisionSpec for harness/brain
rich_trade_decision_and_timing_validatio.sim_evidence: XAUUSDm LONG/SHORT decisions created with TimeExitSpec(close_before_high_impact_news=True, close_at_session_end=True, max_hold_minutes=90/120); submitted; time_exit present in reports; news deferral observed in agent logs

steps_performed: 1. Constructed multiple timing-aware TradeDecisions for XAUUSDm (risk% sizing, BREAKEVEN/ATR trailing, TimeExitSpec news+session+max_hold)
2. Instantiated ExecutionAgent(mql5_bridge_enabled=False) - pure Python primary path (OrderManager + PaperExecutor)

3. agent.submit_decision(td) -> validation, GateEngine check, python fallback execute: Paper fill logged, OrderManager.register_decision (rich: trailing, time_exit carried), ExecutionReport(status='filled', backend='python_order_manager', decision=full with time_exit)

4. Telemetry: new runtime/execution_reports/td_*.json written (time_exit serialized); logs/execution_feedback.jsonl appended (execution_update, decision_executed_python_rich); PIPELINE_DECISIONS.jsonl received trade_decision_ppo entries with decision_id/symbol/side/size/sl_type/tp_type/trailing_type + timing tags

5. agent.force_flatten_all(reason=...) -> executed with news-window awareness: 'deferring ... during news window; TimeExitSpec-managed closes will handle' (direct evidence of smart timing handling in Execution layer)
6. RetrainingTrigger imported and exercised (harness-style outcome recording path; real wiring in promoter/harness emits RETRAIN signals from execution outcomes incl. timing_flags)
7. Confirmed paper_executor writes to logs/trade_journal.jsonl with decision metadata
8. Harness-level: code paths for decision_ppo (uses_rich_decision, _make_rich_decision calling make_risk_based or HybridBrain, submit to agent) inspected + compatible with sim
